entry.title: Re: SAP Demokit version 1.24.3
entry.content:
First of all, I'm sorry you have to deal with such a old version. Maybe search for workarounds to use a later version.

The oldest demo kit available is for 1.38:

https://ui5.sap.com/1.38.62/#docs/guide/95d113be50ae40d5b0b562b84d715227.html

Just use this one or a newer one and check for controls or events when there are available.

entry.title: Re: The Future of SAP CAP: Will More Languages Be Supported?
entry.content: I highly doubt it. Node.js Version is already the most popular and Java plays a minor role, I don't not think they will introduce a other language with low adoption.

entry.title: Re: Name of iOS app is not showing correctly on iOS and MacOS
entry.content:
I upload in attachment

1.under MacOS M2 chip (which can use the ios apps) the screenshots of the video I made ( you will find the begin screenshot and end screenshot as I cannot upload videos), when the app file is being downloaded from Tesflight in the application folder, starting with at the beginning the normal name of the app ''意大利的酒窝 Vini d'Italia.app', then suddenly and stealthily transforming itself by changing its name from '意大利的酒窝 Vini d'Italia.app' to 'SAP Build Apps.app' at the completion of the donwload. So weird!

  1. the screenshot of the iphone names for the app once full downloaded It appears as 'SAPBuildApps' on iphone instead of '意大利的酒窝 Vini d'Italia' for the app. The preview testing app of SAP appears as well as I use it.

I made a test today, copied the app and made a new build from the copy with all the parameters of the build being reinput and problem is still the same. 

Thank you for checking this weird problem.

Best regards,

Chantal

entry.title: Will there still be an SAP HCM in ECC/S/4HANA certification next release?
entry.content: I wanted to plan my exam and saw that it's getting retired

entry.title: Re: Access detail story from main story
entry.content:
Thank you William. How about If I place detail story in a seperate folder and make the folder not visible to the user? Generally users simply open any story they see. So this way there is a chance they will open detail story seperately. I want them to open detail story from main story only. 

or is there any other way you think this can be achieved?

entry.title: Re: How the ABAP Test Cockpit supports you to adopt ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @leandro_oneda @crayabharam ,

yes, I can confirm, that it is the correct behavior: CVA checks must be first licenced before they can be used.

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: What is IDOC Pointer in SAP?
entry.content:
Hello @neelb001 

I guess you are asking about change pointer, as there is no such object as "IDoc pointer".

See SAP Help - Change Pointer (Master Data Distribution) Change pointers are used predominantly in master data distribution ALE scenarios. They ensure that only change master data is distributed.

A change pointer is an additional record pointing to a change document. A change document documents updates of master or transactional data. However, change pointers are used mostly with master data. Then a periodic job (report RBDMIDOC, transaction BD21) analyzes change pointers, builds and distributes IDocs for changed master data and finally updates change pointers statuses to mark them as processed.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: CDS Views: retrieve a field from table joins
entry.content:
Hi,

If you've sorted out the functional direction to join the tables, you can join them in your CDS view in a similar fashion to an SQL query in classic ABAP: ABAP CDS - SELECT, JOIN

entry.title: SAP e Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS: A Inovação Que Acelera o Futuro
entry.content:
🚀🏎️ SAP e Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS: A Inovação Que Acelera o Futuro – Agora no SAP Inside Track Porto!

Mais um ano, a SAP continua a impulsionar a performance da Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS dentro e fora das pistas! 🏁💨 Com tecnologia de ponta e dados em tempo real, a equipe consegue transformar precisão e inovação em vitórias. Mas e se essa mesma revolução tecnológica estivesse ao alcance do seu negócio?

📍 Bem-vindo ao Porto, cidade de inovação e tradição!
O Porto, com sua rica história de comércio e empreendedorismo, sempre esteve à frente do seu tempo. Desde os tempos dos navegadores que levaram inovação além-mar até os dias de hoje, com um ecossistema tecnológico vibrante, a cidade continua a liderar mudanças e a impulsionar negócios.

🖥️ E é exatamente isso que a SAP traz para as empresas de hoje:
✔ SAP HANA – O banco de dados revolucionário que processa grandes volumes de informação em tempo real.
✔ RISE e GROW with SAP – Modelos flexíveis de implementação ERP na nuvem, adaptáveis às necessidades de qualquer empresa.
✔ Inteligência Artificial integrada – Tornando a gestão empresarial mais intuitiva, eficiente e segura.

Agora, imagine tudo isso reunido em um evento imperdível! O SAP Inside Track Porto é o ponto de encontro para quem quer estar na vanguarda da tecnologia SAP.

📅 Data: 27-09-2025
📍 Local: The Lodge Hotel - Rua Serpa Pinto, 60 - 4400-307 V. N. Gaia – Porto

Confira as inscrições no Blog Grupo PORTO na SAP:
https://lnkd.in/d2Evvrnr


Inscreva uma palestra: https://lnkd.in/dYXjee2m
Venha ser sponsor: https://lnkd.in/dXPdvXDn
Venha ser voluntário : https://lnkd.in/dFyACjgG

Link para Tickets de participante:
https://lnkd.in/dqY8xG3b

Venha aprender, partilhar experiências e conectar-se com a comunidade SAP! 🚀

entry.title: Create button with event request http
entry.content:
Hi,

I have the SAP Business One version, and I need to create a button to invoke an HTTP request (to generate a multibanco reference) and update the record.

I also have the b1 usability package installed, and creating a universal function, using the HTTP Trigger, I am not able to do it.

Is it possible to do this functionality?

Thank you.

entry.title: Seeking an SAP Opportunity – Ready to Learn and Grow!
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have been actively searching for my first opportunity in the SAP world for quite some time. While I have some foundational experience across various modules—particularly in WM—I am eager to deepen my skills and grow within an international company.

Breaking into the SAP field without prior experience can be challenging, yet gaining that experience requires someone to take a chance on me. If you know of any junior-friendly opportunities or hiring processes, I would truly appreciate your guidance.

Thank you all in advance! Feel free to connect with me if you have any insights or leads.

entry.title: Integration of Lottie with SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Lottie Creator is a powerful web-based animation tool that simplifies motion workflow and offers a wide range of features. Import Lottie animations or SVGs, customize animations for your Mobile App or Web app

Lottie Useful links to prepare Animation

  • A powerful web-based Lottie animation tool
  • Featured Free Lottie Animations - Curated Motion Designs
  • Integrations and Plugins to Simplify Motion Design Workflow - LottieFiles
  • How to create a 3D flip card in Framer | LottieFiles for Framer - Tutorial - LottieFiles

Benefits of Using Lottie Animations

  • Enhanced User Experience:
    • Visual Appeal: Lottie animations can make your app more visually appealing and engaging
    • Interactivity: Adding animations can make the app feel more interactive and responsive
  • Performance:
    • Lightweight: Lottie animations are vector-based and lightweight, which helps in maintaining app performance
    • Scalability: They scale well on different screen sizes and resolutions without losing quality
  • Ease of Use:
    • Simple Integration: Lottie files are easy to integrate and use within SAP Build Apps.
    • Customization: They can be easily customized to fit the app's design and branding.

Step-by-Step Integration Guide in SAP Build Apps:

  • Setting Up: How to get started with SAP Build Apps and Lottie
  • Install Lottie from Marketplace :  How to find Lottie and Install
  • Adding Lottie Files: Instructions on importing Lottie JSON files into SAP Build Apps.
  • Using Lottie Components: How to use Lottie components within your app, including customization options

Follow the steps shown in numbers.. 

Preview the App

Use Cases

  • Web Applications:
    • Loading Animations: Use Lottie for loading screens to keep users engaged while content loads.
    • Interactive Elements: Enhance buttons, icons, and other interactive elements with subtle animations.
  • Mobile Applications:
    • Onboarding Screens: Use animations to make onboarding processes more engaging.
    • Feedback and Notifications: Provide visual feedback for user actions, such as form submissions or notifications.

Conclusion

  • Summary of Benefits: It makes great key benefits of integrating Lottie with SAP Build Apps.
  • Future Potential: We can briefly discuss the potential future developments and enhancements in this integration and much more to look beautiful animations without any coding or uploading JSON files into SAP Build Apps server side.

By integrating Lottie animations with SAP Build Apps, developers can create more dynamic and engaging applications that stand out in terms of both functionality and aesthetics. 

Keep sharing some creative ideas if you have anything for SAP Build Apps.

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer Challenge March - SAP Community Escape House - AI 🤖🧠
entry.content:
Awesome experience with the escape room. I think escape room concept made the SAP Developer's community a contemporary one.. 
One thing what I have experienced is generative-ai-hub-sdk is a very difficult package install locally without your virtual environment, if you have a lot thing installed. Especially OrchestrationService.

entry.title: Which certification is required to install an SAP HANA Tailored Data Center Integration (TDI) system
entry.content:
Which certification is required to install an SAP HANA Tailored Data Center Integration (TDI) system?

SAP HANA Tailored Data Center Integration (TDI) Overview says:

Let only certified person(s) do the SAP HANA software installation

  • Required exam: C_HANATEC_16 (*) - See SAP Training and Certification Shop for details
  • The exam needs to be successfully passed for a person to perform SAP HANA SW installations
    • SAP HANA hardware partners and their employees do not need this certificate
    • Companies or their employees, who are sub-contractors of hardware partners must be certified to perform HANA SW installations

The highest versions of the exam I can find reference to are:

  • C_HANATEC_17 (Get Certified: C_HANATEC_17 - SAP Community)
  • C_HANATEC_19 (C_HANATEC_19 |SAP Certified Technology 2.0 SPS07 Exam | Udemy)

Searching for 'HANATEC' in Learning Journeys - Overview gives no results.

entry.title: STEPS for Generating Private Key to import in SAP PI/CPI Secure Store
entry.content:
Concept of Key-Based Authentication for SFTP:

SSH (Secure Shell) is a protocol used to securely connect to remote servers like SFTP. One of the most secure methods of authentication in SSH is using SSH keys. This method involves a pair of cryptographic keys: a public key and a private key.

Key Pair Generation:

  • The user (SAP PI being the user) generates a pair of cryptographic keys: a public key and a private key. The private key is kept secret, while the public key can be shared.

Public Key Upload:

  • The user uploads their public key to the SFTP server. This is typically done by adding the public key to the ~/.ssh/authorized_keys file on the server.

Private Key Usage:

  • When the user attempts to connect to the SFTP server, the client (i.e. SAP PI) uses the private key to sign a challenge from the server.
  • The server verifies the signature using the stored public key. If the signature is valid, the user is authenticated.

Prerequisites:

  • For windows, OpenSSL or GIT for Windows should be installed. (If you are using a Linux or mac, OpenSSL is likely pre-installed, and you can just use it from terminal)
  • If you are using GIT in windows, your environment variable “PATH” should contain the file path “…\Git\usr\bin”.
  • If you do not have admin access in your windows PC, you can edit PATH from:
    • Control Pantel > User Accounts > User Accounts > Change my environment variables (to the left panel)

Step 1: Create Private Key Pair: (Skip to Step 2 if you have a key pair)

Using PuTTYgen: (Courtesy: https://www.ssh.com/academy/ssh/putty/windows/puttygen)

  1. Open PuTTY Gen

     

  2. To create a new key pair, select the type of key to generate from the bottom of the screen.
  3. Click Generate and start moving the mouse within the Window. Putty uses mouse movements to collect randomness. The exact way you are going to move your mouse cannot be predicted by an external attacker. You may need to move the mouse for some time, depending on the size of your key. As you move it, the green progress bar should advance.

     

  4. Once the progress bar becomes full, the actual key generation computation takes place. This may take from several seconds to several minutes. When complete, the public key should appear in the Window. You can now specify a passphrase for the key.
  5. You should save at least the private key by clicking Save private key. It may be advisable to also save the public key, though it can be later regenerated by loading the private key (by clicking Load).

This public key can be shared with third parties, enabling them to include it among their authorized keys on their server.

 

Using OpenSSL:

  1. Go to the folder where in you want to save your private key and type CMD in file explorer address bar. (For Linux, right click and choose option “open in terminal" & For Mac, use the command CD)
  2. In command prompt/terminal type the following command (Replace the key name as per your requirement):
    • openssl genrsa -out keypair.pem 2048
  3. To extract the public part, use the following command (Replace the key name as per your requirement):
    • openssl rsa -in keypair.pem -pubout -out publickey.pem
  4. Your private key “keypair.pem” and public key “publickey.pem” will be saved and available in your current folder.

Step 2: Convert PPK to PEM using PuTTYgen.  (Skip if key pair is already in. PEM format)

(Courtesy: https://repost.aws/knowledge-center/ec2-ppk-pem-conversion)

  • Start PuTTYgen. For Actions, choose Load, and then navigate to your .ppk file.
  • Choose the .ppk file and then choose Open.
  • (Optional) For Key passphrase, enter a passphrase. For Confirm passphrase, re-enter your passphrase.
  • Note: Although a passphrase isn't required, it's a best practice to specify one. This is a security measure to protect the private key from unauthorized use. A passphrase makes automation difficult, because users must manually log in to an instance or copy files to an instance.
  • From the menu at the top of the PuTTY Key Generator, choose Conversions, Export OpenSSH Key.
  • Note: If you didn't enter a passphrase, then you receive a PuTTYgen warning. Choose Yes.
  • Name the file and add the .pem extension. Select save.

 

Step 3: Generate a self-signed x503 certificate:

  • Open Command prompt/terminal in the directory where you have your private key file.
  • Execute the following command to generate a self-signed x503 certificate using the private key:
    • openssl req -new -x509 -days 3650 -key keypair.pem -out x509_Private.pem
  • Enter the passphrase and then it will prompt to enter some more parameters.
  • Note: Only country is mandatory parameter.

Step 4: Generate compatible PKCS#12 file:

  • To upload the private key and self-signed certificate in SAP PI/CPI/IS, we need to generate a PKCS#12 file.
  • A PKCS#12 file, also known as a PFX (Personal Information Exchange) file, is a binary format file that can store a private key along with its associated digital certificate(s). PKCS#12 is a standard defined in the Public-Key Cryptography Standards (PKCS) and is often used to bundle a private key and its corresponding certificate chain into a single encrypted file.
  • Execute the following command to generate a compatible PKCS#12 key:
    • openssl pkcs12 -keypbe PBE-SHA1-3DES -certpbe PBE-SHA1-3DES -export -in x509_Private.pem -inkey keypair.pem -out PrivateP12.p12

       

  • Parameters “-keypbe PBE-SHA1-3DES” and “-certpbe PBE-SHA1-3DES” specify the encryption algorithms to encrypt private key and certificate while creating our PKCS#12 file.
  • When we do not specify these parameters, the PKCS#12 is generated using encryption algorithm AES-256.
  • Most versions of SAP PI and SAP CPI/IS do not support PBE algorithm AES-256. Hence, we specify SHA1-3DES algorithm for encrypting our certificate and private key.
  • Your .p12 file is generated and can be imported into SAP PI/CPI secure store.

 

Note: There are various methods to generate a private key and signed certificate for your PI/CPI system. The method demonstrated in this blog is the most commonly used by basis administrators, based on my observations. While I am not a basis administrator myself and apologize for any potential inaccuracies in my approach, I am confident that this method for creating keys for SSH logon is effective.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1: Open a form as View Mode
entry.content:
Dear @Peach14 , 

If you are using version 10.0, you may use the web client, where:

  • By default, forms are open in read/view mode
  • Configure the client so it will be entirely read-only

For further information about the web client:

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/exploring-sap-business-one-web-client 

Regards,

Maya

From what I see RITA is still in testing and has quite a few restrictions that are difficult to manage.

Thanks in advance.

entry.content: Hi junwu, I used the communication system to activate the api on my public cloud production system. After activating it on system I used the endpoint https://myXXXXXX-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PRODUCT_SRV in my custom Fiori Application. When I deploy I get the error mentioned above, what am I doing wrong? Thanks Junwu. Erickgoulardt Thanks also for your support for the topic

entry.title: Re: Consume Odata V2 ord V4 in custom App Fiori deployed...
entry.content: it is not supported. https://me.sap.com/notes/3424818

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps How to call Odata resource with Expand
entry.content:
Hi Rahul,

The call required by you is technically an expanded entity call.

You would need to create an application which is based on requirement either showing a list of items, or has a selection criteria, where users are updating specific details like: Inspoper and Insplot.

In either case, once a list/table item is selected or the selection criteria values are executed, you should handle that event in the controller by performing a call for an expanded entity with the passed parameters.

Do let me know if you need any more hints for the same.

Best Regards,

Rohit

entry.title: Re: Mass SPRO Special Procurement Key config options
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

Further to my brief, i meant to say that with Abaper help we executed T460T in editable mode in SE16N and then tried to update LONG TEXT in this Table, however this again turned out to be much manual effort as we have to do in all 3 system Dev, QA and PROD separately.

Hence, my Client want to move this only via TR to ensure same changes are moved across landscapes. Currently am trying with "Script Recording and Playback" option to achieve this.

However, i would really appreciate, if i could get any other alternate means to achieve this Client request.

Regards,

Jeffrey

entry.title: Re: Creating/enabling a new WFA on HANA instance
entry.content: Hi @Marina_Popa - you can start import the template configuration, no need to wait for measure template upload.  The measure template is needed when you want to view the measures on WFA site.

entry.title: Re: WFA - Permission artifacts sync job failing
entry.content:
Hi @amfonseca,

Can you please narrow down on which structural dimension the artifact sync failed?  If this happened on Location structure, usually this is caused by duplicate nodes in the structure.  That is nodes with different letter case but actually refer to the same thing.  You can use Dimension Editor menu to have a look at the Location structure.  If it was failed on other structural dimensions, please check for duplicate as well.

entry.title: Re: Contract Request document could not be sent to the external system. Error Message: Response retu
entry.content: I'm experiencing this same error. were you later able to find the fix?

entry.title: Request for Assistance Extending SAP Certificate Validity
entry.content:
Dear SAP Certification Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

My SAP certification (linked below) is set to expire on March 31, and I would like to extend its validity. However, the system prompts me to have an Active SAP Learning Subscription (SAP LH). As a freelancer with over 10 years of hands-on experience in this specific product, I would like to clarify:

Is the SAP Learning Subscription mandatory to renew this certification?

If so, are there alternative pathways for experienced professionals to extend certification validity without this subscription?

The current cost of the SAP LH subscription (₹1.12 lakh INR) for an individual contributor, especially as it exceeds the certification fee by nearly fourfold. Also, SAP LH does not appear to be available for individual purchase, creating a significant barrier for freelancers like myself.

I have recently completed two additional certifications (details available upon request) and remain committed to maintaining my credentials. Could you advise if there are:

Exemptions for professionals with extensive experience?

Alternative assessments or renewal options without SAP LH?

Any upcoming programs for individual/affordable renewal pathways?

Your guidance would help me retain my certification and continue contributing to the SAP ecosystem.

Certificate Details:
https://www.credly.com/badges/99100aa7-dc1f-4d08-8aff-55397bfb6c43/public_url

Thank you for your time and support.
Best regards,
Sankaran A

entry.title: Re: Flow Builder: Using exit to fetch HBKID/HKTID for Accounting Documents missed those information
entry.content:
@RenatoEXT973 

As stated in this post, OP2022 by default using Flow Builder Plus, hence the loading class concept is depreciated.

Refer to my posts regards Flow Builder Plus for a better understanding.

entry.title: Re: "I am not able to take the 'Stay Certified' assessment.

entry.title: Re: Can we still edit a Transferred Sales Order from C4C...
entry.content: Hi Robert - it's mostly on Open/In Process tickets only. Orders that aren't processed yet before the cut-off times. We are currently using S4 HANA on premise and we are using standard integration.

entry.title: SolMan Java -> Diagnostics Agentの通信で使用するポートについて
entry.content:
担当者様
平素よりお世話になっております。

SolMan Java -> Diagnostics Agentの通信ですが、Diagnostics Agentが待ち受けているポート番号をご教授頂けないでしょうか。

また、この通信で SolMan Java がどの Diagnostics Agent に接続するかの情報はどこに保存されているのかをご教授頂けないでしょうか。

以上、よろしくお願い致します。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SolMan Java -> Diagnostics Agentの通信で使用するポートについて
entry.content:
ご担当者　様

平素よりお世話になっております。

Diagnostics Agent が Solution Manager Java へ接続する際には、Solution Manager Java ホスト上のポート81xxおよび5xx04（P4Sポート有効時は5xx06）をご利用いただいております。

詳細につきましては、以下のナレッジベース技術記事をご参照ください。
2012760 - Ports in Solution Manager for Diagnostics Agent registration

エージェント接続情報は、下記ファイルに格納されております。
・パス：/usr/sap/DAA/<SMDAXX>/SMDAgent/configuration/
・対象ファイル：runtime.properties および secstore.properties

宜しくお願いいたします。

SAPサポート

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: IV invoice for Consignment
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Regarding invoice for consignment, please follow the best practice below:

Customer Consignment (1IU)

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: SUM Upgrade Fails: Missing DDNTT Table & EA-DFPS Not Imported – Need Guidance
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I'm facing critical issues during a SUM upgrade of S/4HANA system (SID: S4D, DB: HANA 2.00.078) with SUM 2.0 SP22. The upgrade fails during the Extract phase with the error:

"EA-DFPS is in an undefined state that is not safe to be upgraded. Reason: Upgrade wasn't completed - Contact the SAP Support!"

Environment Details:

  • System: SAP S/4HANA (SID: S4D)
  • Database: SAP HANA (Version: 2.00.078.00.1715149848, DB SID: DDH)
  • Current Version: SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS 01 (02/2024)
  • Target Version: SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS 02 (10/2024)
  • SUM Version: Initially SUM 2.0 SP19 (PL10); later upgraded to SUM 2.0 SP22
  • OS: Linux X86_64 (OS Version: 2.34)

Problem Overview and Timeline:

  1. During the upgrade process with SUM 2.0 SP19, SUM attempted to access table DDNTT during the step Preprocessing, phase EU_CLONE_ALLSIZES.
  2. I confirmed by querying M_TABLES that the table DDNTT does not exist in the system.
  3. I then Reset and Cleanup the SUM process and I switched to SUM 2.0 SP22 in the hope that the newer version would handle the missing DDNTT differently.
  4. However, SUM now fails during the Extract step, at PREP_INIT/VALCHK_INI phase,  with the error message:
    "EA-DFPS is in an undefined state that is not safe to be upgraded. Reason: Upgrade wasn't completed - Contact the SAP Support!"
  5. Using transaction SPAM, I checked the package status and confirmed that all EA-DFPS packages are marked as "Not Imported".

Files Attached:

  • SAPup_troubleticket.txt (complete error summary)
  • SAPup.txt (SUM log)
  • Screenshot-SUM.jpg (screenshot of SUM error)

Has anyone encountered a similar situation where SUM fails due to a missing DDNTT table and EA-DFPS packages not being imported?

Any insights, SAP Notes references, or step-by-step guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,
Ben

Feel free to let me know if any additional details are needed.

entry.title: 回复： Re: How to achieve Cost of Poor Quality / Third Party...
entry.content:
Hi Pardeep,

I think source inspection can cover the third-party inspection you mentioned.

And regarding to the cost tracking in QM, there is no workaround in public cloud. A feature reqeust needs to be raised.

Best Regards,
Matt

entry.title: Re: Authorisations for Fiori App
entry.content:
Hello Abhishek,

Thanks for the response 

After I copy the SAP role to Z business role i run the task list.I add the catalog and the space related to the role. The apps are added to the spaces as well.

I check if all the services in role are green and ICF nodes are active.

But still get the errors related to Service groups metadata, ESH_Search_srv.

Do we solve these authorisation errors one by one; I expected it to be fixed by the run of task list.

Is there any step that i am missing that even after activation the authorisation issues are not solved.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1: Open a form as View Mode
entry.content: Unfortunately, I'm using SAP B1 10.0 on premise not on cloud.

entry.title: Re: Welcome, glad to see you here!
entry.content: nice to see everybody here virtually.

entry.title: Need help with CL_GUI_DOCKING_CONTAINER, SIZE BAR.
entry.content:
I often use DOCKING CONTAIENR to do ALV GIRD.

If you use the DOCKING CONTAINER, it will be attached to one of TOP, BOTTOM, LEFT, and RIGHT.

At this point, the SIZE BAR will appear on the other side where the CONTAINER can be adjusted.

I want to use DOCKING CONTAINER to keep the SIZE BAR from coming out.

I know how to prevent SIZE BAR from coming out using CL_GUI_SPLITTER_CONTAINER, but I couldn't find a way to prevent SIZE BAR from coming out using DOCKING CONTAINER.

I'd like to hear from you if there is a method for the above or if it's impossible.

I ask for your help.

entry.title: Re: 导入销售合同—2302云销售新功能前瞻
entry.content: @omega-ou 据我了解只支持内部编码，如果你用外部编码的话，还需要通过VA02去更改，你可以试试

entry.title: Re: Re: Fiori App Analyze PIR Quality
entry.content: The Analyze PIR Quality app has been deprecated. The functions are available in the ”Maintain PIRs” app. You can refer to the link below to get more information. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e296651f454c4284ade361292c633d69/3d465d4e8e40411e962f0ed4ab94e8d2.html?version=2022.000

entry.title: Re: SG GST Report - Not able to download data from preview
entry.content:
For SG GST return, the download function is not support. You can print it.

For SG GST return submission, the download function is support.

Request failed with status code 500". Could you please check? thank you

entry.title: Re: Work Schedule rule and IT0007/IT0008
entry.content:
System will take care the number of working Hours. While configuring IT007 it will take default value. But when you execute payroll and check PARTT Function under GENPS the Days calculation will vary from month to month. 

You can do a check on Over time wage type for the month of Jan and Feb based on working hours in this case I believe we should alter Valuation basis PCR

entry.title: SAP Desktop Agent can't Add Attributes or run Unattended Mode projects
entry.content:
I'm currently trying to run a SAP Business Process, which executes a Task Automation process. The process is relatively straightforward, the Task Automation reads from a CSV, and outputs the variables into a form back in the Business Process. I followed the steps in the Agent Management agent settings tutorial:

- SAP Desktop Agent is installed and connected to tenant. It can run automations in Design Mode.

- The agent is added to the environment under Agent Management. It is shown as idle.

- The project has been deployed, and the agent version set to match the Desktop Agent.

The only thing I was unable to follow was the adding of agent attributes, as the trial version doesn't let me create a new environment or add any agent attributes to the existing environment. When I run the process, the project does not load into the agent, even though it is connected and idle in the environment. In addition, checking the agent's available projects shows nothing. May I know any steps I am missing?

Any help would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: 回复： 导入销售合同—2302云销售新功能前瞻
entry.content:
Hi，

@Feng_Chen ，我刚才测试了，导入销售订单了，VA02修改不了销售订单号的。

entry.title: How to Print Comments in the TAB Console in Eclipse for Custom Logic in SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content:
I'm developing custom logic in SAP Public Cloud using Eclipse for debug, and I need to print out comments or debug messages inside the TAB Console. I've tried a few approaches, such as using write:, but I haven't been able to get the output to appear as expected.

Has anyone successfully achieved this? Are there specific commands or configurations required to enable logging in the Eclipse console for SAP Public Cloud custom logic?

 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: ABAP RICEF Estimating Guidelines
entry.content:
Hi , 

if i understand your requirement correctly , you are looking for WRICEF estimate calculator which takes into account the high , low and medium nature of the complexity during the initial project planning   and also helps you to come with a initial effort number based on this scientific approach rather than by gut feel.

@N1kh1l  please assist

entry.title: Need help with X015 and X115 PCRs
entry.content:
Please find attached the image and kindly advise what exactly the below operators do in X115 - Valuation bases.

Pls advise why we have included ADDNA* and FILLF N repeatedly. What is the relevance of these operators? 

Does VALBS0 update IT and OT tables?

VALBS0

ADDNA *

FILLF N

WGTYP = *

VALBS1

ADDNA *

FILLF N

WGTYP = *

VALBS2

ADDNA *

Pls find attached the image.

@sikindar_a

entry.title: Re: Need help with X015 and X115 PCRs
entry.content: NIL

entry.title: Re: "I am not able to take the 'Stay Certified' assessment.
entry.content: I came across the same issue and raised a ticket, but no response yet.

entry.title: Re: SAP SOM with SD Billing
entry.content:
Hi,

The Add-on product SAP S/4HANA for Subscription Billing, Sales and Distribution Option 1.0 (SOLINVE 800) handles such business processes where the subscription contract lifecycle management is taken care in BRIM-SOM but the billing and invoicing is done in SD. This is typically for subscription processes with FI-AR scenarios. Below is the link of the landing page for the add-on. You can have a look at the product assistance and installation guides for details.

SAP S/4HANA for Subscription Billing, Sales and Distribution Option | SAP Help Portal

NOTE: You will still need a dummy contract account and a lean convergent invoicing. The CI billing document is transferred to SD invoicing using the add-on processes. Thanks.

Regards
Deepak

entry.title: Re: Transfer Stock Using Manual Reservation
entry.content: Hi Dominik, If we just do transfer posting, yes I've managed to do it. But how we do it through manual reservation?

entry.title: Re: "I am not able to take the 'Stay Certified' assessment.
entry.content:
Hi, Try to open these links during midnight during work week. Not on weekends, this is just because of network traffic and not a majar issue...

The whole world their SAP certification are expiring on 31st March..just imagine the network traffic on these sites.

entry.title: Re: Aggregation on Data Action
entry.content: Please put dimension FLOW and AUDIT also into your table , make all dimension show leaf only and check the data before DA calculation

entry.title: Re: Request for information about BAdI in the Calculation Schema
entry.content: Dear Polly, I created the condition record for TTX1 with tax code "AA" however the logic IF PRCG_ELEMENT_ATTRIBUTES-CONDITIONTAXCODE = 'AA' and PRCG_ELEMENT_ATTRIBUTES-conditiontype = 'TTX1' doesn't match because PRCG_ELEMENT_ATTRIBUTES-CONDITIONTAXCODE is empty, I saw the account determination of that item are MWS for Accounting Key and Tax Code AA. please tell me how to capture tax code 'AA' for PRCG_ELEMENT_ATTRIBUTES-CONDITIONTAXCODE Many thanks.

entry.content:
William_Yu   

added all leaf's that you have asked in table grid please suggest what would be the next step

entry.title: Controlling Issue Stor Location of Constituents in MRP Area
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts

Good afternoon.

We have two MRP areas set up for our plant and several storage areas under each. We are also using PP/DS.

The problem we are having is that we cannot control the Issue Stor Location for Component A when we run the MRP for Product A. We want to set the Issue Stor Location of component A to storage location X or storage location Y or whatever we want.

Currently, even if I specify the Issue Stor Location of the manufacturing version of Product A as Storage Location X in MRP Area ①, the Issue Stor Locations of Components A, B, and C are not set to X. (X is an assumption that the Issue Stor Location is not set to the Leading storage location in the MRP Area ① setting in the PP/DS Location Master.)

Please help.

Ok Sui

Thanks for the reply I would like to close this thread.

Pardeep

entry.title: Re: Call for Speakers (SIT DFW) - spring 2025
entry.content:
Hi @SergioG_TX 

Thank you for the opportunity! 😊

I wanted to follow up to see if you had a chance to review my previous message.

Topic: AI & ML-Driven Intelligent Condition Monitoring for Seamless Rail Operations

Techwave has developed an Intelligent Condition Monitoring Platform integrated with SAP ERP using Microsoft Azure to enhance performance, minimize unplanned downtime, and improve reliability for a leading Australian transport and energy business. This solution enables real-time monitoring of Rolling Stock, Primary Maintenance Facility Equipment, and Simulators, facilitating proactive decision-making and ensuring seamless rail operations.

Spokesperson: Srinivas Kode


Could you please let me know where we can send the abstract? Also, kindly let me know if you need any additional details.


I look forward to your response.


Thank you!

Best,
Sravya Palukuru
Email: sravya.palukuru@techwave.net

entry.title: Re: Reference document number in Intercompany Matching Re...
entry.content: Hello, Please check the SAP note: 3114245 - Using Document Reference field (XBLNR) in ICMR

entry.title: Re: Aggregation on Data Action
entry.content: You should show leaf only for account, time and product in row axis for better understanding of your data as well.

entry.title: Re: Electronic Invoicing in Malaysia
entry.content:
Hello Mervyn,

We are in ECC6 EHP6. For Malaysia e-Invoicing the per-requisite support pack 12 is not yet reached. But, despite that, want to implement Malaysia e-Invoicing solution. Will that still be possible without upgrading to support pack 12 or above?

What key features I have to consider if I have to go ahead with existing support pack level below recommended one.

Your quick response is highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Integrating with the Alerts System API in SAP Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
Hey @pvsbprasad ,

I have 2 questions:

  1. Is this feature only available for "Individual Customers" UI and not for other UIs like Accounts or Opportunities or leads etc?(Content type is always set to INDIVIDUAL_CUSTOMER) And if yes, then do you know if there are plans to make it available in the future by SAP?
  2. What are the other allowed value of response's icon? "error_filled" was just an example, but how can one pass some warning or informational messages?

You wrote "To send an alert to the system, use the following JSON request format" but that's not true because (based on what I read on Help documentation, pls feel free to correct me) system sends these attributes to Alert API endpoint when UI loads and consuming system just need to consume the request body and send out the response payload back.

Thanks

Saurabh

entry.title: Vendor Rebate Arrangement Error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When I try to create a Vendor Rebate Arrangement in MEB1, I get an error like this:

"Transaction MEB1 cannot be executed (SAP Note 2476734)

Message No. 00977

Diagnosis

The execution of the transaction was disabled by a system configuration (the blacklist monitor).

Procedure

Avoid using this transaction or contact your system administrator.

Procedure for System Administration

For more information about the blacklist monitor, see SAP Note 2476734.

Please support.

Thanks in Advance,

entry.title: 🧹 Spring Cleaning Your SAP Customer Data! (FI-AR, SD Archiving Explained Simply)
entry.content:
What is Customer Master Data Archiving? 📦

Imagine you have tons of customer files, some for active customers, and many for those you haven't dealt with in ages. Archiving is like moving those inactive customer files from your "active filing cabinet" (your live SAP database) to a well-organized "archive box" (an archive file).

Why Archive Customer Master Data? 🤔

Boost Performance: Less data in your live system means faster processing and reports! 🚀
Save Storage Space: Archived data takes up less space in your main database. 💾
Compliance: Meet legal and company requirements for data retention and deletion. ✅
Keep it Clean: A cleaner system is easier to manage and understand. ✨

How Does it Work in SAP (FI-AR, SD)? 🛠️

SAP uses something called Archiving Object FI_ACCRECV to handle this. Think of it as the tool specifically designed for archiving customer master data in Finance and Sales.

Here's the simplified process:

1. Deletion Flag: First, you need to mark the customer records you want to archive with a "deletion flag". This is like saying, "Hey SAP, these customers are inactive and ready to be archived." You can do this for the whole customer or just specific parts (like Finance or Sales data).
2. Checks & Prerequisites: SAP then does a health check! It makes sure certain conditions are met before archiving, like ensuring there are no open transactions for that customer.
3. Archiving Process (using FI_ACCRECV):
Write Program: This program selects the customer data marked for deletion and writes it into archive files (those "archive boxes").
Delete Program: After the data is safely in the archive files, this program removes it from your live SAP database.
4. Access Archived Data: You can still access archived data later if needed using special tools, it's just not clogging up your daily system.

Where to Find the Archiving Function in SAP? 📍

Transaction SARA: The central place for all archiving activities in SAP. Just enter `FI_ACCRECV` as the archiving object.
Application Menus:
FI: Go to `Customers → Periodical Tasks → Archiving → Customers`.
SD: Navigate through `Logistics → Sales and Distribution → Master Data` (or `Master Data` in SAP Retail) and find `Business Partners → Customers Archiving`.

https://www.linkedin.com/posts/mickaelquesnot_sara-activity-7302366311525826560-Vw9t/

https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7302593606379290625/

entry.title: 🤯 SAP Archiving Order Matters! 🤯 Customer/Vendor FIRST, then Business Partner!
entry.content:
The Problem: You're in transaction `SARA`, trying to archive Business Partners (using archiving object `CA_BUPA`), and SAP stops you with that error message. It's like SAP saying, "Hold your horses! You're trying to archive the foundation before removing the building on top!" 🧱➡️🏠

Why This Happens: SAP's Data Hierarchy Explained Simply 🤔

In SAP S/4HANA, the Business Partner (BP) is the leading object. Think of it as the central hub for all your customer and vendor information. Customers and Vendors are then linked to this Business Partner.

Business Partner (BP): The main contact person or organization.
Customer: The BP from a sales perspective.
Vendor: The BP from a purchasing perspective.

Because the BP is the central piece, SAP needs you to archive the linked Customer and Vendor data first. It's like peeling an onion – you have to remove the outer layers (Customer/Vendor) before you can get to the core (Business Partner). 🧅

The Solution: Archiving in the Right Order! ✅

To successfully archive Business Partners, you need to follow this order:

1. Archive Customer Master Data (if applicable): Use transaction `SARA` and archiving object `FI_ACCRECV`. This is like archiving your customer-specific "outer layer". (Check out my previous LinkedIn post on Customer Master Data Archiving for a "dummies" explanation! [Link to your Customer Archiving Post if you made one])
2. Archive Vendor Master Data (if applicable): Use transaction `SARA` and archiving object `FI_ACCPAYB`. This is like archiving your vendor-specific "outer layer". (Again, see my previous post on Vendor Master Data Archiving for a simple guide! [Link to your Vendor Archiving Post if you made one])
3. NOW Archive Business Partners: Once the linked Customer and Vendor data is archived, you can finally archive your Business Partners using transaction `SARA` and archiving object `CA_BUPA`. This is like finally getting to archive the "core" BP data.

Why is this important? SAP does this to maintain data consistency and avoid data loss. If you deleted the Business Partner first, you could create orphaned Customer/Vendor records, which would cause all sorts of problems! 😬

Key Takeaway for SAP Beginners: 💡

Remember the order! Customer/Vendor data MUST be archived before Business Partner data. Think of it as SAP's way of keeping your data house in order! Follow this sequence, and you'll avoid those frustrating archiving errors and keep your S/4HANA system nice and tidy! ✨

https://www.linkedin.com/posts/mickaelquesnot_gusap-s4-hanaarchiving-business-partnersdocx-activity-7302386221962432514-jTO_/

entry.title: Re: Aggregation on Data Action
entry.content: Check your data if value of unit account match value of price account for all dimensions, then you can execute and check result .
